# eximIA Integration Hub

> Universal integration contract for the eximIA ecosystem

## Docs

- [Contract Spec (JSON)](/api/spec): Machine-readable contract specification — full endpoint definitions, schemas, auth, pagination, errors, webhooks, and admin panel implementation guide
- [Documentation](/docs): Interactive human-readable documentation with 10 sections
- [Full Spec](/llms-full.txt): Complete contract specification in plain text for LLM consumption

## Tools

- [Contract Tester](/test): Discover app catalogs and test operations
- [Sandbox](/sandbox): Pull real data from connected apps
- [Schema Validator](/validate): Validate catalog JSON against contract v1
- [Ecosystem Status](/status): Monitor app availability
- [Webhook Tester](/webhook-test): Send test webhooks with HMAC-SHA256

## Overview

The eximIA Integration Contract v1 defines how apps in the eximIA ecosystem communicate. Any app implementing 5 endpoints becomes automatically connectable to any other — present or future — with zero hardcoding, no intermediary, and no package dependency.

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/integration/catalog` — Discovery: returns entities, schemas, operations
- `GET /api/v1/integration/:entity` — List paginated data
- `POST /api/v1/integration/:entity` — Create record
- `GET /api/v1/integration/:entity/:id` — Get individual record
- `PUT /api/v1/integration/:entity/:id` — Update record

### Auth

Header: `x-eximia-api-key: eximia_<app>_<random32>`
Scopes: read, write, admin
Storage: SHA-256 hash (never raw key)
